Campaigns

Axe the Fuel Tax

Can you afford to pay more to drive your car? Rachel Reeves is planning to hike Fuel Duty for the first time in 15 years. War in Ukraine and the Middle East...

Say No to Starmer's ID

Labour's “Digital ID” gimmick won't stop the boats. It's a desperate distraction from their scandals. We won't back any system that makes ID mandatory for...

Cut my bills

Labour promised to cut your energy bills by £300, but they’ve gone up by almost £200. Urge Labour to back our Cheap Power Plan which would cut everyone’s...

Action on Solar Farms

Karen is working with local residents to safeguard productive farmland. She surveyed constituents and received 727 responses which she sent to the Secretary of State.

Helping combat Loneliness and Isolation

Karen's Pensioners Information & Advice Fairs around the Moorlands make a real difference.

Opposing Government policies

Many local residents have contacted Karen about the government's plans to cut winter fuel payments, about the family farm tax and also with concerns about devolution.

Re-opening the Leek -Stoke Railway Line

I will, however, continue to lobby for this and any other schemes which could open up transport links within the Moorlands.

Promoting local businesses and the Moorlands

Biddulph Old Hall is one of Karen's great Reasons to Visit the Moorlands.

Keeping the Moorlands Safe

Karen works with Staffordshire's Police, Fire & Crime Commissioner to get more police on the beat.

Dame Karen Bradley MP Member of Parliament for Staffordshire Moorlands
